description: The Barreca 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Pellaro neighborhood of Reggio Calabria, Italy. It emerged as an offshoot of the Ambrogio 'ndrina in the 1980s and became dominant after the death of Carmelo Ambrogio. The clan is involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, arms trafficking, extortion, and murder. Its historic capobastone, Filippo Barreca, became a collaborator with justice in 1992.
